positive: A mystical, stylized forest scene viewed through a pair of glowing, geometric hexagonal lenses. The foreground features highly detailed silhouettes of diverse flora (ferns, luminous mushrooms, twisting roots) arranged in a radial, symmetrical composition. The background shows a misty, twilight forest canopy with subtle, iridescent bokeh effects. Color palette should be dominated by deep indigo, emerald green, and soft cyan luminescence, accented by brilliant pops of gold or amethyst. Style should be a blend of Art Nouveau poster art and clean, high-contrast vector illustration, suitable for screen printing on black or white fabric. Central focus is the perfect blend of organic shapes and crystalline structure, ensuring maximum print clarity and wearable aesthetic.
negative: blur, artifact, text, watermark, signature, low detail, noise, fuzzy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, grainy
